_rationale: CLX S8 (final get_context slice): mode=semantic selects [semantic, ai] sections; include_ai_text=true forces the ai section to populate rather than gate off. `Add` is trivial (2-line function, no branches) so no code_smells fire here -- this golden pins the AI SECTION SHAPE (natural_language_summary mentions the symbol name, all five ai_context keys present) end-to-end through the MCP envelope, complementing the direct-engine AiContextFixture unit tests (tests/mcp_handlers_core_test.cpp) that exercise the long-function/high-cyclomatic-complexity smell paths against a purpose-built high-complexity fixture the shared multi-lang corpus does not contain.
_rationale_sort_arrays: Trap 1 (CLX port map): Go map/hash-iteration order is not stable across runs for several array-shaped fields this response can carry (e.g. ai_context.code_smells/best_practices/refactoring_suggestions, semantic_context.propagation_labels). None of those fire non-deterministically for this trivial `Add` fixture today, but the tier is declared so a future corpus/fixture change that does populate them compares set-wise (content match) rather than positional -- the same sort_arrays mechanism already used by tests/integration/http/search.spec.json and cli/search/json.spec.json for the identical class of non-determinism.

tiers._rationale_stable: Full envelope + body; content[].text carries the full JSON-RPC-wrapped get_context response (context + metadata + performance).
tiers._rationale_ignore: Standard JSON-RPC envelope noise plus timing residue. The metadata/performance envelope's own timing/index fields are masked inside content[].text by the MCP-mode inner-text normalization the runner already applies (spec_runner.cpp:NormalizeMcpInnerText) rather than by this outer tier map.
